headline: P&L exposure: ₹14.4 Cr direct revenue gain (engine estimate) + ₹50-100 Cr potential annualized upside (engine estimate)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is driven by end-market demand, not upstream or downstream disruptions.
P/E multiple may see a modest 0.05x upward revision due to earnings momentum (engine estimate). Margin uplift of 10.0 bps supports valuation, but cash flow drag tempers upside.

Improved profitability could lower cost of capital by 10-20 bps if sustained, but cash flow weakness may offset some benefit. No immediate bond spread impact, but green financing eligibility is enhanced.
